tools.name: finance_convert_currency
tools.description:
Use this when you need to convert between any currencies -- both fiat (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY) and crypto (BTC, ETH, SOL). Returns conversion result in JSON.

1. convertedAmount: the resulting amount in target currency
2. exchangeRate: the rate used for conversion
3. from: source currency code
4. to: ta
